_comment: SEO Autopilot configuration. Copy to .seo-config.json in your website repo root (recommended) or to ~/.config/seo-autopilot/config.json (global fallback), then edit.
_gsc_auth_comment: GSC data is pulled via the search-console MCP server. Default + recommended auth is OAuth (a desktop OAuth client downloaded from Google Cloud). See docs/gsc-mcp-setup.md. Set the path to your OAuth client_secrets.json below. (Service-account auth is also possible — set gcp_credentials_path instead and leave this null.)
_deploy_comment: auto_merge=false (recommended) makes the agent open a Pull Request instead of merging to main. Set true ONLY for fully unattended loops you trust.
